title: Wockhardt Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Wockhardt Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Wockhardt Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wockhardt Hospitals:
Wockhardt Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
